name: doubled_l_set
describes: Day 2 in source — abstract L1..L3 set followed by a concrete-dataset L1..L3 set. Tests group detection.

input.raw_cell_text:
L1: Introducing the data - “How can we use this information?”L2: Learn how to read graphs (bar, line, pie) - How to pull information from graphs - differentiate graphs by aptitude level L3: Interpret graphs - drawing conclusions  
  
L1- Introduce dataset for bar graph (ASPCA or St Huberts)   
  
L2-  Introduce dataset for Pie Chart (ASPCA or St Huberts)   
  
  
L3 - Introduce dataset for Line graph (ASPCA or St Huberts)
